IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (29149998.pdf)
SUMMARY: Highly motivated, dynamic Human Resources professional with diverse credentials seeking a position to make a positive impact on company policies and experience career growth. Experienced in administrative and human resources roles.
SKILLS: Compensation knowledge, MS Office Suite, AR/AP proficiency, Oracle knowledge, Great communication skills, Great analytical skills, New Hire Training, Filing & Records Management, Spreadsheets/Reports, Office Management, Customer Service, QuickBooks, Peachtree, New Hire paperwork
